statement: Save failure behavior — If save fails, keep the user’s current work visible. Mark it as — Affects useBuilderNodes.ts, save error state, retry/manual save behavior,
affected_modules: src/services/builder.service.ts; src/services/versions.service.ts; autosave hooks; src/utils/export.helpers.ts; src/utils/import.helpers.ts; local cache
ux_impact: User keeps working draft visible and understands save
